title: selaginella minima
intro: Selaginella minima, also known as the lesser spikemoss or dwarf spikemoss, is a small, evergreen plant that belongs to the Selaginella genus. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is known to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and aiding in the relief of pain and inflammation. Selaginella minima can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture to utilize its medicinal properties, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its effects.
